target:
(If it means getting through this situation, I'm not going to care about my own appearance anymore!
I don't have time to worry about my image!)

(They look exactly like the real ones.
Their memories too…)
(Then there's no choice… this is the only way!)
When I give the signal, run immediately…
But how am I supposed to run all of a sudden?

Please!
Just trust me for once!

Hey, Mio.
Do you know what they're up to?
Let's finish this quickly.

Ah, that's… Erika-san…!
Why are you here!?

Shinpei, where are you!?
Where's Erika-chan!?
I told you to run when I gave the signal!

Crap, she's not here at all!
You tricked me!

I messed up…
I should've explained more carefully to Totsumura-san.

Heh heh!
Sorry, the plan failed.

Ah! I get it now!
That's what you meant!

You idiot!
How dare you trick me!

Cut me some slack!
I'll kill you!

(I'm done for…
This is the worst outcome…)

Uwahhh!!!
Get out of my way, you damn thing!

There… I got rid of that fake face…
Even I can do that…
Huh! When did you get there, Mio!?

T-the knife… it's in my stomach…
No hesitation at all… that's not normal…

But… I did it, Shinpei.
I defeated my shadow… now it's just Mio.

That's true, but how long are you going to sleep, Totsumura?
Wake up and play!

I was hoping to keep the suspense a bit longer,
but you spoiled it too fast, Mio.
Then, Shinpei, what are you going to do?

Well, I'll leave it to you, Mio.
I have my own things to do.
That's fine, but don't do anything extra.

Shin, you really went all out for a straight-up fight.
That was a waste of your life.
(Crap, I'm going down to this guy…)

( I did it, I'm back…!
I can try again! )

Shin, where are you?
You're hiding around here, right?
Come out!
Hey, that fake Mio has a knife!

( This place… it's the same as before…
And it's exactly the same moment… )

Found you!
You were here all along!
( I finally got a chance to try again… but now… )
I have something to ask you, Shin…
